pages.title: Project Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the Create_TF-IDF_Text-Fabric_features project: its purpose, the problem it solves, the corpus it targets, and how the outputs are consumed. Links to child pages for setup and background concepts.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Practical guide for running the pipeline: prerequisites (Python, Text-Fabric, scikit-learn, pandas), how to open and execute the notebook, where output files are written, and how to load the resulting features into a Text-Fabric session via N1904addons.

pages.title: License and Citation
pages.purpose: Documents the CC BY 4.0 license terms, attribution requirements, the CITATION.cff schema, and how to cite the software in academic work. Covers the images/CC-BY-40.png badge asset and the N1904addons attribution URL.

pages.title: Pipeline Architecture
pages.purpose: Overview of the end-to-end data engineering pipeline: from corpus ingestion through TF-IDF computation to feature export. Introduces the two processing paths (full-corpus and non-stopword) and links to child pages for each stage.

pages.title: Data Ingestion and Corpus Aggregation
pages.purpose: Explains how the N1904 corpus with additional features is loaded via Text-Fabric's `use('CenterBLC/N1904', version=

, hoist=globals())` call, how `collect_tokens_by_book()` iterates over all `word` nodes to extract the `normalized` and `book` features, and how the resulting Dict[str, List[str]] document-term structure treats each GNT book as a discrete document.

pages.title: TF-IDF Computation
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the scikit-learn TfidfVectorizer configuration: the identity tokenizer, accent preservation (`strip_accents=None`), case normalization, and why the vectorizer is configured to skip standard NLP preprocessing. Covers the full-corpus (`tfidf`) and non-stopword (`tfidfns`) computation paths, including the stop-word POS tag set `{'intj', 'prep', 'art', 'conj'}` and the 10^6 scaling factor used to convert float scores to integers.

pages.title: Feature Export and Persistence
pages.purpose: Describes how computed scores are mapped back to Text-Fabric node IDs, stored in a pandas DataFrame, and serialized to `.tf` files via `TF.save(nodeFeatures, metaData)`. Covers the `createMetadata()` utility, the output path (`~/text-fabric-data/github/CenterBLC/N1904/tf/1.0.0`), and the validation step using `sampleNodesForToken()`.

pages.title: Output Features Reference
pages.purpose: Reference documentation for the two Text-Fabric features produced by this pipeline. Introduces both features and links to child pages for detailed specifications.

pages.title: tfidf Feature
pages.purpose: Full specification of the `tfidf` feature: node type (`word`), value type (`str`/`int`), scoring formula (TF-IDF × 1,000,000), example values (`12`, `85658`), the `.tf` file header metadata (author, coreData, version, license, dateWritten), and how to query it in a Text-Fabric session.

pages.title: tfidfns Feature
pages.purpose: Full specification of the `tfidfns` (non-stopword) feature: how it differs from `tfidf`, the stop-word filtering logic applied before vectorization, example values (`0` for stop-words, `952564` for rare lexemes), the `.tf` file header metadata, and interpretation guidance for researchers.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Definitions of all codebase-specific terms, domain concepts, abbreviations, and API names that an onboarding engineer or biblical-studies researcher would need to understand this project. Each entry includes code pointers.
